svg.text: Tier 3: All the Things Wiring Diagram
5 ESP32 nodes + 2 Climate + Relay + 4ch Lighting + 2 Cameras + 4 Smart Plugs + Load Cell + Reed Switch + Pump | ~$370+
SporePrint Server | Mosquitto MQTT :1883 | Web UI :3001 | USB-C 5V 5A
10K pull-down (G-GND) | 1N4007 flyback across fan | Drain->Fan(-) Fan(+)->12V
Same circuit: GPIO26 -> 100R -> IRLZ44N -> Exhaust Fan -> +12V
Same circuit: GPIO27 -> 100R -> IRLZ44N -> Circ Fan -> +12V
GPIO32 -> HX711 DOUT | GPIO33 -> HX711 SCK
3.3V -> VCC | GND -> GND | Load cell: E+/E-/A+/A-
5kg cell under grow block for harvest weight tracking
GPIO35 -> Reed Sw -> GND | Door open = HIGH
Magnet on door, switch on frame. Pauses humidity on open.
Each channel: same MOSFET circuit as relay node.
At substrate level, angled up for pin/fruit capture
ESP32-S3 CAM | OV5640 | USB-C 5V | node_id: cam-02
Above substrate looking down for colonization progress
5V USB-C: Pi (5A), Climate #1, Climate #2, Camera #1, Camera #2
12V 10A PSU: 3 fans + peristaltic pump + 4 LED strips
Tasmota plugs: AC mains (self-powered). All WiFi/MQTT.
SporePrint | Tier 3: All the Things | github.com/sporeprintai/sporeprint
